---
name: Keyboard Support Request
about: Request support for a new keyboard
labels: keyboard-request, help wanted
---

**Keyboard name**
e.g. Keychron Q1, Tofu60

**VIA/QMK compatible?**
Yes / No / Not sure

**Do you have the JSON definition?**
If yes, please attach it or link to it.

**Additional info**
Layout, MCU, any links to the keyboard's page.
